# Let's load the raw text file
path = '/mnt/data/file-2bgfnJkxy3XLbMsXVa4Zwt-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    raw = f.read()
len(raw), raw[:5000]

import re, json, sys
raw = raw  # from previous cell

def find_all(raw, sub):
    """Find all non-overlapping occurrences; returns list of (start, end)."""
    res = []
    start = 0
    while True:
        idx = raw.find(sub, start)
        if idx == -1:
            break
        res.append((idx, idx+len(sub)))
        start = idx + 1  # find overlapping? minimal shift; allow overlapping just in case
    return res

candidates = []

# 1) The ayah from al-Ahzab 21
ayah1 = "لَقَدْ كَانَ لَكُمْ فِي رَسُولِ اللَّهِ أُسْوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ لِمَن كَانَ يَرْجُو اللَّهَ وَالْيَوْمَ الْآخِرَ وَذَكَرَ اللَّهَ كَثِيرًا"
find_all(raw, ayah1)

subs = [
"اختر منهم أربعاً وفارق سائرهن",
"اختر منهن أربعاً",
"فَانْكِحُوا مَا طَابَ لَكُمْ مِنَ النِّسَاءِ مَثْنَى وَثُلَاثَ وَرُبَاعَ",
"فانكحو ما طاب لكم من النساء مثنى وثلاث ورباع",
"فانكحوا ما طاب لكم من النساء مثنى",
"انكحوا",
"أن يطلق أربعاً ويمسك أربعاً",
]

for s in subs:
    locs = find_all(raw, s)
    print(s, locs)

def ctx(start, end, pad=40):
    s = max(0, start-pad)
    e = min(len(raw), end+pad)
    return raw[s:e]

targets = {
"Ayah-Ahzab21": (180, 312),
"Hdid-IkhtarMinhum": (571, 600),
"Hdid-IkhtarMinhun1": (705, 721),
"Ayah-FankihuDiacritics": (1004, 1076),
"Ayah-FankihuNoHamza": (1894, 1938),
"Ayah-FankihuPartial": (1521, 1554),
"Snippet-unkahu1": (1327,1333),
"Snippet-unkahu2": (4573,4579),
"Hdid-Yutliq": (834,861),
"Hdid-IkhtarMinhum-2": (3530,3559),
"Hdid-IkhtarMinhun-2": (3665,3681),
"Hdid-Yutliq-2": (3792,3819),
}
for k,(s,e) in targets.items():
    print(k, (s,e), ctx(s,e))
raw.find('النبي ﷺ فذكرت ذلك له، فقال')

# Let's print the rest from 3967 to 3975 to include "أربعًا"
print(raw[3967:3975])
print([(ch, hex(ord(ch))) for ch in raw[3967:3975]])

s = "اختر منهن أربعاً"
[(ch, hex(ord(ch))) for ch in s]

import re

# Pattern for "اختر منهن أربع" plus tanween on alif either order
pattern_minhun = re.compile(r'اختر منهن أربع(?:ا\u064b|\u064bا)')
matches = [(m.start(), m.end(), m.group(0)) for m in pattern_minhun.finditer(raw)]
matches

pattern_yutliq = re.compile(r'أن يطلق أربع(?:ا\u064b|\u064bا) ويمسك أربع(?:ا\u064b|\u064bا)')
[(m.start(), m.end(), m.group(0)) for m in pattern_yutliq.finditer(raw)]

pattern_minhum = re.compile(r'اختر منهم أربع(?:ا\u064b|\u064bا) وفارق سائرهن')
[(m.start(), m.end(), m.group(0)) for m in pattern_minhum.finditer(raw)]

def check_boundary(idx):
    return raw[idx-2:idx+2]

for name, (s, e) in targets.items():
    sub = raw[s:e]
    before = raw[s-1] if s>0 else ''
    after = raw[e] if e < len(raw) else ''
    print(name, repr(before), repr(sub[:10]+"..."), repr(after))

# Extract all substrings inside double quotes and list them with indices
quotes = []
i=0
while True:
    s = raw.find('"', i)
    if s==-1:
        break
    e = raw.find('"', s+1)
    if e==-1:
        break
    content = raw[s+1:e]
    quotes.append((s+1, e, content))
    i = e+1
len(quotes), quotes[:10]

citations = [
    {"span_start": 180, "span_end": 312, "span_text": raw[180:312], "citation_type": "Aya"},
    {"span_start": 571, "span_end": 600, "span_text": raw[571:600], "citation_type": "Hadeeth"},
    {"span_start": 705, "span_end": 721, "span_text": raw[705:721], "citation_type": "Hadeeth"},
    {"span_start": 834, "span_end": 861, "span_text": raw[834:861], "citation_type": "Hadeeth"},
    {"span_start": 1004, "span_end": 1076, "span_text": raw[1004:1076], "citation_type": "Aya"},
    {"span_start": 1521, "span_end": 1554, "span_text": raw[1521:1554], "citation_type": "Aya"},
    {"span_start": 1894, "span_end": 1938, "span_text": raw[1894:1938], "citation_type": "Aya"},
    {"span_start": 3530, "span_end": 3559, "span_text": raw[3530:3559], "citation_type": "Hadeeth"},
    {"span_start": 3665, "span_end": 3681, "span_text": raw[3665:3681], "citation_type": "Hadeeth"},
    {"span_start": 3792, "span_end": 3819, "span_text": raw[3792:3819], "citation_type": "Hadeeth"},
    {"span_start": 3957, "span_end": 3973, "span_text": raw[3957:3973], "citation_type": "Hadeeth"},
    {"span_start": 4573, "span_end": 4579, "span_text": raw[4573:4579], "citation_type": "Aya"},
]
# Validate that span_text equals raw substring and boundaries are not including punctuation/quotes
def is_clean(span):
    s = span["span_start"]; e = span["span_end"]
    before = raw[s-1] if s>0 else ''
    after = raw[e] if e<len(raw) else ''
    # punctuation to exclude: quotes, brackets, variety
    excluded = set('"\'«»[](){}،؛:.,!?…—–ـ \n\t')
    return (before not in excluded) or True  # we won't enforce rule because before char can be space or colon; not an error

# Print all spans summary
for c in citations:
    print(c["span_start"], c["span_end"], c["citation_type"], repr(c["span_text"]))
